signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.passwordUpdated: Your password was updated successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.
signIn.emailVerified: Your email has been verified. You can now sign in.
signIn.invalidVerification: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
signIn.missingVerification: The verification link is missing or corrupted.

signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.name: Name
signUp.completeVerificationFirst: Please complete security verification before signing up.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.instructions: Enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If your email address is registered, you'll receive a password reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder too.
forgotPassword.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: This reset link is invalid or missing.
resetPassword.done: Your password was updated successfully. Redirecting to sign in…
resetPassword.invalidToken: Invalid reset link. Please try the forgot password flow again.
resetPassword.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.sentMessage: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
verifyEmail.checkInbox: Check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
verifyEmail.notReceived: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder.
